headline: 3 Dirt-Cheap Stocks Under $45 Built to Outperform in a Volatile Market
summary: Volatility can lower the cost of entry into businesses that throw off real cash, even as investors recognize that a low share price alone is no guarantee of a bargain. headline: Wall Street Walked Away From This Powerhouse Stock, But I Am Buying It on Repeat
summary: I keep buying Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) every time my brokerage cash builds up, and I am not slowing down. The market is treating this company like a value trap because COVID revenue is rolling off. headline: This 7% Yielding Healthcare Powerhouse Belongs in Retirees’ Portfolios
summary: Few large-cap dividends generate as much skepticism as Pfizer (NYSE:PFE). The stock trades at $24.37, and the COVID franchise erosion has been brutal, with Comirnaty down 59% and Paxlovid down 63% in Q1 2026. Yet the dividend keeps coming. I want to know if that 7.27% yield is a gift or a warning. The Dividend ... This 7% Yielding Healthcare Powerhouse Belongs in Retirees’ Portfolios
